commands: vite install # should install packages first
vite pm list --json # should list installed packages
vite pm list testnpm2 --json # should list specific package
vite pm list --depth 0 --json # should list packages with depth limit
vite pm list --long --json # should list packages with extended info
vite pm list --parseable --json # should list packages in parseable format
vite pm list --prod --json # should list production dependencies only (uses --include prod --include peer)
vite pm list --dev --json # should list development dependencies only (uses --include dev)
vite pm list --no-optional --json # should exclude optional dependencies (uses --omit optional)
vite pm list --exclude-peers --json # should exclude peer dependencies (uses --omit peer)
vite pm list -- --loglevel=warn --json # should support pass through arguments
